index.title: Manage Your Stress
index.description: Simple daily habits to help you feel calmer and more in control.

sleep.title: Get Restful Sleep
sleep.description: Aim for 7–9 hours of sleep each night. Try to sleep and wake up at the same time daily.
sleep.why: Sleep helps your brain and body recover and lowers stress hormones.

breathing.title: Practice Deep Breathing
breathing.description: Spend a few minutes focusing on your breath. Slow breathing reduces anxiety.
breathing.why: Slow breathing activates your body's relaxation response.

exercise.title: Move Your Body
exercise.description: Light walking or stretching helps release stress and improve mood.
exercise.why: Exercise releases endorphins and improves mood.

caffeine.title: Limit Caffeine & Sugar
caffeine.description: Too much caffeine and sugar can increase anxiety and disturb sleep.
caffeine.why: Too much caffeine and sugar increases anxiety and sleep problems.
do: Replace one coffee with herbal tea
Avoid caffeine late in the day

planning.title: Plan Your Day
planning.description: Break large tasks into smaller steps to avoid feeling overwhelmed.
planning.why: Planning reduces mental clutter and overwhelm.
do: Focus on one task at a time
